name: Developed Plains - Open Grass Version
movement_design: Grass and path are walkable. Path is a visual guide. Objects and structural cells block movement.

legend.S: walkable start zone near ruined cottage
legend.X: walkable end/scene-transition tile near forest endpoint

start: Lower-left ruined cottage area. Suggested player spawn around cell (8, 29) or near world position matching that cell.
end: Top forest path, cells marked X. Use EndPointTilemap or trigger collider for next-scene transition.
notes: This layout is a semantic planning guide, not an exact pixel-perfect extraction from the painted map.
Use the atlas to paint a real Unity Tilemap. Paint solid object cells into BlockedObjectTilemap.
Keep flowers, tiny grass, and low pebbles on DecorationTilemap if they should not block movement.
